allow: Bash(ls -la "O:\\claude code\\nftgen\\layers"" 2>/dev/null || echo "layers directory does not exist or is empty ")

Bash(printf '\\n/* ── Toast notification ──────────────────────────────────────────────────── */\\n#toast-container {\\n  position: fixed;\\n  bottom: 20px;\\n  right: 20px;\\n  display: flex;\\n  flex-direction: column;\\n  gap: 8px;\\n  z-index: 9999;\\n  pointer-events: none;\\n}\\n.toast {\\n  background: var\(--face\);\\n  border-top: 1px solid var\(--hi\);\\n  border-left: 1px solid var\(--hi\);\\n  border-bottom: 1px solid var\(--sh2\);\\n  border-right: 1px solid var\(--sh2\);\\n  padding: 8px 14px;\\n  font-size: 12px;\\n  color: var\(--text\);\\n  max-width: 320px;\\n  box-shadow: 2px 2px 4px rgba\(0,0,0,.35\);\\n  opacity: 1;\\n  transition: opacity 0.4s ease;\\n}\\n.toast.fade-out { opacity: 0; }\\n.toast .toast-title {\\n  font-weight: bold;\\n  margin-bottom: 4px;\\n  color: var\(--title1\);\\n}\\n.toast .toast-line { margin: 2px 0; }\\n.toast .toast-fail { color: var\(--danger\); }\\n')
Bash(# layers.bak ended up inside layers/ due to order of operations. Move its contents back. cd ""O:/claude code/nftgen"" && rm -rf layers && mv layers.bak layers ; ls layers/ 2>&1)
Bash(if not exist "O:\\claude code\\nftgen\\.github\\workflows" mkdir "O:\\claude code\\nftgen\\.github\\workflows")
